title: Israeli fire kills nine people in Gaza, including a child and journalist, medics say

snapshot.title: Israeli fire kills nine people in Gaza, including a child and journalist, medics say
snapshot.description: CAIRO: Israeli strikes and gunfire killed ​at least nine people, including a child and a journalist from Al Jazeera, in the Gaza Strip on Saturday, health officials said. An Israeli airstrike killed four Palestinians, including two women and a child, in an apartment building in Gaza City, health officials said. The attack on the building in the Sabra neighborhood of Gaza City
snapshot.author: Reuters
snapshot.pageTitle: Israeli fire kills nine people in Gaza, including a child and journalist, medics say | Arab News
